title: Comparing Energy Providers
context: Provider A: Gas £45/month, Electric £35/month. Provider B: Gas £50/month, Electric £30/month. Provider C: Gas £40/month, Electric £40/month.

questions.question: What is an energy 'provider'?
options: A company that supplies gas or electricity
questions.answer: A company that supplies gas or electricity

questions.question: What does 'switch provider' mean?
options: Change to a different energy company
questions.answer: Change to a different energy company

questions.question: What is a 'fixed tariff'?
options: The price stays the same for a set time
questions.answer: The price stays the same for a set time

questions.question: Which provider has the cheapest gas?
